texto: Narada Muni says - Whether you consider the human to be an eternal jivatma or a temporary body, or even if you accept an indescribable opinion that he is both eternal and temporary, you do not have to lament in any way. There is no cause for lamentation other than the affection which has arisen out of delusion. (1.13.44)
explicacao: Orientação direta de Srimad Bhagavatam sobre passagem do tempo e prioridades. A afirmação “Narada Muni says - Whether you consider the human to be an eternal jivatma or a temporary body, o…” funciona como lembrete prático ligado a fe, krishna, spiritual, útil em momentos de spiritual.
